zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Foote於大約1553年出生在英國賀特福爾羅伊斯頓時，他的父親John Foote25歲，母親Helen Warren alias Waller26歲。他於1576年6月18日與Joan Brooke在英國米德萊可雷迪其聖 萊昂納達斯結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年2月16日之前在英國艾可沙爾福德，埋葬在英國艾可沙爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Foote于大约1553年出生在英国賀特福爾羅伊斯頓时，他的父亲John Foote25岁，母亲Helen Warren alias Waller26岁。他于1576年6月18日与Joan Brooke在英国米德萊可雷迪其聖 萊昂納達斯结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年2月16日之前在英国艾可沙爾福德，埋葬在英国艾可沙爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Foote
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English fot ‘foot’ (Old English fōt), sometimes translated in medieval documents by Latin cum pede ‘with the foot’. Probably a nickname for someone with a deformity of the foot or with large feet.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English personal name Fot, from Old Norse Fótr, originally a nickname with the same sense as 1 above.
English: topographic name for someone who lived at the foot of a hill.

variants.name: Foot
meanings: North German: from Middle Low German vōt ‘foot’; probably a nickname for someone with some peculiarity or deformity of the foot.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Foote was born about 1553, in Royston, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John Foote, was 25 and his mother, Helen Warren alias Waller, was 26. He married Joan Brooke on 18 June 1576, in St Leonard's, Shoreditch, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 16 February 1609, in Shalford, Essex, England, and was buried in Shalford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Foote est né environ 1553, à Royston, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Foote, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Helen Warren alias Waller, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan Brooke le 18 juin 1576, à St Leonard's, Shoreditch, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 16 février 1609, à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre.

Juni 1576 in St Leonard's, Shoreditch, Middlesex, England Joan Brooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 16. it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Foote è nato il circa 1553 nel Royston, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Foote, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Helen Warren alias Waller, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan Brooke il 18 giugno 1576, nel St Leonard's, Shoreditch, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 16 febbraio 1609, nel Shalford, Essex, England, e fu sepolto a Shalford, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Footeが約1553年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアロイストンで生まれた時，父John Footeは25歳，母Helen Warren alias Wallerは26歳であった。1576年6月18日にイギリスミッドレセックスショアディトチスト レオナルド'スでJoan Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年2月16日以前にイギリスエセックスシャルフォードで死去し，イギリスエセックスシャルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Foote(이)가 대략 1553년 영국 허트퍼드실르 로이스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Foote(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Warren alias Waller(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1576년 6월 18일 영국 미들레세스 쇼레딧치 스트 리나르드'스에서 Joan Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 2월 16일 이전 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Foote nasceu aproximadamente 1553, em Royston, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Foote, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Helen Warren alias Waller, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Brooke em 18 de junho de 1576, em St Leonard's, Shoreditch, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 16 de fevereiro de 1609, em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Foote родился около 1553 г. в местности роистон, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Foote было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Warren alias Waller, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Brooke 18 июня 1576 г. в местности ст леонард'с, шауредич, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 16 февраль 1609 г. в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Foote nació aproximadamente 1553, en Royston, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Foote, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Helen Warren alias Waller, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Joan Brooke el 18 de junio de 1576, en St Leonard's, Shoreditch, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 16 de febrero de 1609, en Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra.
